channel.title: Online talks at the JavaScript for WordPress Conference
channel.description:
We're happy to share that we're giving a few talks at the **[JavaScript for WordPress Conference](https://javascriptforwp.com/conference/)** this week! Here's the schedule:
**Connecting Gutenberg and Frontity: A Case Study** → **9 July at 19:00 UTC** .
In this session, our product manager @SantosGuillamot is going to provide his insight on building the frontity.org website using Gutenberg and Frontity.
![jsforwp-mariotalk|690x388](upload://fWmxK49Y5PoFUXnvRQ4Pci5R67k.png)
**Introduction to the Frontity Framework** → **10 July at 20:00 UTC** .
Our co-founder @Pablo will give an introduction to the basics of the framework, talk about our key learnings from these years and share our vision of JavaScript in the WordPress ecosystem.
![jsforwp-pablo-talk|690x388](upload://1qHcz9IPln26LzdHwq7jIlI21E3.png)
Check out the **full schedule and register for free** here: https://javascriptforwp.com/conference/.
See you there! 🙂

item.title: Online talks at the JavaScript for WordPress Conference
item.dc:creator: Reyes
item.description:
We’re happy to share that we’re giving a few talks at the JavaScript for WordPress Conference this week! Here’s the schedule:

Connecting Gutenberg and Frontity: A Case Study → 9 July at 19:00 UTC .

In this session, our product manager @SantosGuillamot is going to provide his insight on building the frontity.org website using Gutenberg and Frontity.

Introduction to the Frontity Framework → 10 July at 20:00 UTC .

Our co-founder @Pablo will give an introduction to the basics of the framework, talk about our key learnings from these years and share our vision of JavaScript in the WordPress ecosystem.

Check out the full schedule and register for free here: https://javascriptforwp.com/conference/.

See you there!

Read full topic
item.source: Online talks at the JavaScript for WordPress Conference
